# service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service.spec

> **Unit Test Layer**

Unit tests for the [GetACoffeeService](../get-a-coffee.service/classes/GetACoffeeService.md).

## Remarks

Each test runs the service inside an isolated Effect DI container
backed by [InMemoryCoffeeRepository](../../../repository/coffee-repository/variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md).  Validates:

- **Happy path** — `execute` returns the correct `Coffee`
  when a matching name exists in the repository.
- **Not-found path** — `execute` fails with
  [CoffeeNotFoundError](../../../errors/classes/CoffeeNotFoundError.md) whose `coffeeName` matches the input.
- **catchTag recovery** — the tagged error can be caught and
  mapped using `Effect.catchTag("CoffeeNotFoundError", …)`.
